title: Valmiki Ashram
tagline: Valmiki Ashram — spiritual town of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Valmiki Ashram (Nepali: वाल्मीकि आश्रम) is a Hindu Balmiki temple situated in Chitwan district of Nepal, inside Chitwan National Park.
overview.description: Valmiki Ashram (Nepali: वाल्मीकि आश्रम) is a Hindu Balmiki temple situated in Chitwan district of Nepal, inside Chitwan National Park. It is close to the Triveni Dham where Tamasa, Sona and Sapta Gandaki rivers meet. Deities worshipped here include Rama, Sita, and Valmiki. The festival of Rama Navami is also celebrated here.

topPlaces.name: New Kanpur City
topPlaces.description: New Kanpur City is a satellite city of Kanpur, India. The new city spreads over 10,000 acres of prime land on the banks of the Ganges.

topPlaces.name: Bithoor
topPlaces.description: Bithoor or Bithur is a town in Kanpur district, 25 km (15mi) by road north of the centre of Kanpur city, in Uttar Pradesh, India. Bithoor is situated on the right bank of the River Ganges, and is a centre of Hindu pilgrimage.

topPlaces.name: Unnao dead bodies row
topPlaces.description: On 14 January 2015, more than one hundred unidentified dead bodies were found floating in the River Ganges in Unnao district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. The dead bodies are believed to be of mostly unmarried girls and children.

topPlaces.name: Nyotini
topPlaces.description: Nyotini is a town and nagar panchayat in Hasanganj tehsil of Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh, India. Located 3 km southeast of Hasanganj on the right bank of the Sai river, Nyotini was historically one of the main centres of Muslim settlement in the district and it has several mosques and shrines.

topPlaces.name: Pariyar
topPlaces.description: Pariyar, also spelled Pariar, is a village in Sikandarpur Sarausi block of Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located on the left bank of the Ganges, 23 km northwest of the city of Unnao.

topPlaces.name: Choubepur Kalan
topPlaces.description: Choubepur Kalan is a census town in Kanpur district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

topPlaces.name: Kalyanpur, Uttar Pradesh
topPlaces.description: Kalyanpur or Kalianpur (earlier Kullianpore) is a satellite town of Kanpur in Uttar Pradesh, India. Located about 15 km from Kanpur on the Grand Trunk Road towards Delhi, it is effectively a suburb of Kanpur.

topPlaces.name: Flight Laboratory, IIT Kanpur
topPlaces.description: Flight Laboratory, IIT Kanpur is an airstrip/aerodrome located inside IIT Kanpur's campus at Kalyanpur 18 kilometres west of city of Kanpur, India. It is used by the Aerospace Engineering department of IIT Kanpur.

items.note: New Kanpur City is a satellite city of Kanpur, India. The new city spreads over 10,000 acres of prime land on the banks of the Ganges.

Bithoor or Bithur is a town in Kanpur district, 25 km (15mi) by road north of the centre of Kanpur city, in Uttar Pradesh, India. Bithoor is situated on the right bank of the River Ganges, and is a centre of Hindu pilgrimage.

On 14 January 2015, more than one hundred unidentified dead bodies were found floating in the River Ganges in Unnao district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. The dead bodies are believed to be of mostly unmarried girls and children.

Nyotini is a town and nagar panchayat in Hasanganj tehsil of Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh, India. Located 3 km southeast of Hasanganj on the right bank of the Sai river, Nyotini was historically one of the main centres of Muslim settlement in the district and it has several mosques and shrines.
Pariyar, also spelled Pariar, is a village in Sikandarpur Sarausi block of Unnao district, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is located on the left bank of the Ganges, 23 km northwest of the city of Unnao.
Choubepur Kalan is a census town in Kanpur district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

Kalyanpur or Kalianpur (earlier Kullianpore) is a satellite town of Kanpur in Uttar Pradesh, India. Located about 15 km from Kanpur on the Grand Trunk Road towards Delhi, it is effectively a suburb of Kanpur.

Flight Laboratory, IIT Kanpur is an airstrip/aerodrome located inside IIT Kanpur's campus at Kalyanpur 18 kilometres west of city of Kanpur, India. It is used by the Aerospace Engineering department of IIT Kanpur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Valmiki Ashram?
faq.a: The best time to visit Valmiki Ashram is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Valmiki Ashram?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kanpur Airport (20 km) and the nearest railway station is Kanpur Central (18 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Valmiki Ashram?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Valmiki Ashram at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Valmiki Ashram?
faq.a: Stays in Valmiki Ashram start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Valmiki Ashram?
faq.a: The top attractions are New Kanpur City, Bithoor, Unnao dead bodies row, Nyotini, Pariyar.
